'''Ward Fizark''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] who was the husband of [[Sharina Fizark]].

==Biography==
He worked as a [[Miner/Legends|miner]] for [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] for several years before leaving his position and attempting to work as a hunter. He was killed during a hunting trip in [[3956 BBY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}}
